title: Intelligent Process Supervision Module (IPSM) Runtime State Evolved

systemStatusDynamic.description: Automatically updated operational health status of the IPSM.

activeAgentIdsAutonomous.description: Autonomously managed list of currently supervised agent unique identifiers.

totalSupervisedProcessesDynamic.description: Dynamically updated count of distinct processes managed across all active agents.

avgResponseTimeDynamic.description: Autonomously updated average response time of supervised agents in milliseconds.

failedRequestsPercentageDynamic.description: Dynamically updated percentage of failed requests across all supervised agents.

cpuUsagePercentageDynamic.description: Autonomously updated average CPU usage percentage of supervised agents.

cpuLoadPercentDynamic.description: Autonomously updated average CPU load percentage over the last observation interval.

memoryAllocatedMBAutonomous.description: Dynamically incremented total system memory (in MB) allocated to the IPSM and supervised tasks.

iopsReadPerSecAutonomous.description: Autonomously updated input/operation operations read per second (optional telemetry metric).

memoryUsagePercentageDynamic.description: Dynamically updated percentage of system memory used by the IPSM and supervised tasks.

lastUpdateTimestampMSAutonomous.description: Automatically incremented unix timestamp (milliseconds) indicating when this state report was generated.

validatedPolicyIntegrityDynamic.description: Flag indicating whether the IPSM policy integrity has been dynamically validated.

acronym.description: Acronym of the certified dynamic manifest.

version.description: Version of the certified dynamic manifest.

policyIntegrityThresholdDynamic.description: Dynamically updated threshold for policy integrity.

sslEnabledDynamic.description: Flag indicating whether SSL/TLS is enabled for IPSM communications.

corsEnabledDynamic.description: Flag indicating whether CORS is enabled for IPSM web services.

authRequiredDynamic.description: Flag indicating whether authentication is required for IPSM services.

certifiedDynamicManifests.description: List of certified dynamic manifests with current integrity status.

previousDynamic.description: Autonomous link to previous IPSM runtime state schema.

selfDynamic.description: Autonomous link to current IPSM runtime state schema.

nextDynamic.description: Autonomous link to next IPSM runtime state schema.
